faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: I'm a complete beginner, is SeenYT easy to use?
faq.a1: Extremely easy! We designed the interface specifically for non-tech users. There's a 3-step hands-on process, you just follow the instructions to create your video.
faq.q2: Can SeenYT help my videos go trending?
faq.a2: Yes! Our tools use AI to analyze YouTube's algorithm, find trending topics, and guide you on optimization (SEO, Thumbnail, Script) to maximize your chances of being recommended.
faq.q3: Can I monetize videos created with SeenYT?
faq.a3: Absolutely. You own 100% of the copyright for videos you create. Many of our users have enabled monetization and are earning revenue from YouTube and Affiliate programs.

virtual-mc.name: AI Virtual MC (Lip Sync)
virtual-mc.long: Create AI virtual hosts from photos. Automate video presentations, news, or training without live recording.

image-forge.name: AI Thumbnail Designer
image-forge.long: Design eye-catching thumbnails with AI. Automatically analyze colors and layouts that drive clicks.

text-to-speech.name: Text to Speech
text-to-speech.long: Convert text to natural-sounding speech. Supports multiple languages and voice styles.

seo.name: SEO & Keywords Pro
seo.long: Analyze and optimize keywords for YouTube algorithm. Create titles, tags, and descriptions for top rankings.

micro-niche-miner.name: High CPM Niche Finder
micro-niche-miner.long: Deep dive into micro-niches to maximize ranking potential. Reduce competition with long-tail keywords.

dubbing.name: AI Dubbing Studio
dubbing.long: Transform international videos into your own. Auto-translate, dub, and lip-sync. Support TikTok/YouTube downloads.

velocity.name: AI Video Generator
velocity.long: Create faceless videos automatically. High-quality stock footage, auto scene matching, optimized for Shorts, TikTok, Reels.

scriptwriter.name: Viral Scriptwriter
scriptwriter.long: Write scripts optimized for virality. Focus on the first 30 seconds (Hook) to retain viewers. Works for any niche.

narrative-studio.name: Story / History Generator
narrative-studio.long: Deep content storytelling tool. Build scripts with depth, diverse contexts, and emotions. Perfect for storytelling channels.

script-refiner.name: Script Refiner & Upgrader
script-refiner.long: AI text optimization to improve wording and make scripts sound more natural and professional.

rival-scanner.name: Competitor Analysis
rival-scanner.long: Deep analysis of competitor strategies. Get data on effective keywords, traffic sources, and successful content patterns.

hidden-channel-finder.name: Blue Ocean Niche Finder
hidden-channel-finder.long: Find small YouTube channels with explosive growth. Discover unsaturated niches to exploit early.

thay-youtube.name: YouTube Teacher - 30 Day Course
thay-youtube.long: Your 30-day YouTube journey companion. Daily lessons, integrated tools, and content guidance to reach your first 1000 subs.

niche-engine.name: 100% Winning Niche Library
niche-engine.short: Choose niches & generate Long Video scripts.

footer.mission:
SeenYT's mission is to empower all Vietnamese creators – especially beginners with no experience or large capital – to create quality content, find high-paying niches, optimize SEO, thumbnails, scripts... to turn YouTube passion into a real and sustainable income source.
We believe: Everyone deserves a chance to shine on YouTube, regardless of their starting point. And SeenYT will always accompany you on that journey.
